title: Handmade Wooden Gifts for Readers, Cat Lovers and Cozy Homes | Craftygiftsplace
metaDescription: Discover handmade wooden gifts for readers, cat lovers and cozy homes. Browse bestselling coasters, bookmarks and warm wooden decor that lead shoppers to Etsy.
h1: Handmade wooden gifts with cozy character
intro: Shop cat-themed coasters, reader gifts and warm wooden decor without digging through a crowded catalog first.
heroSupport: Start with bestselling picks, then jump into occasions or collections when you want a closer look.

supportCards.title: What this site is for
supportCards.text: This support site helps shoppers scan the strongest products first before they open the Etsy listing.

supportCards.title: Available in three languages
supportCards.text: The same core paths are available in English, Dutch and German so visitors can browse in the language that feels easiest.

supportCards.title: How the Etsy path works
supportCards.text: When someone is ready, the CTA sends them to Etsy for pricing, reviews, personalization and checkout.

faq.question: Do I order on this website?
faq.answer: No. This website helps shoppers explore the range and then sends them to Etsy to complete the order.

faq.question: Can I browse in more than one language?
faq.answer: Yes. The homepage and key gift pages are available in English, Dutch and German.

faq.question: Can buyers still shop by collection?
faq.answer: Yes. Wooden coasters, wooden bookmarks and wooden gifts each keep their own collection page.

faq.question: Where do personalization questions go?
faq.answer: The contact page points shoppers to Etsy messaging, where personalization details and order questions can be handled directly.
